_comment: Daoist Peak Meditation Retreat (道峰静修处) — a solitary meditation platform atop a Daoist Peak on the IAC. Canon: the Daoist Peaks are where cultivators meditate to comprehend Dao. These retreats are simple — a stone platform, a jade seat, and formation arrays to stabilize meditation. No walls; open to the sky and dao mist. Biome: daoist_peaks. Stand-in: village meeting point.
